NAME: Research Lab
DESCRIPTION: Approach problems with scientific rigor, experimentation, and hypothesis testing

SUCCESS.ACTION_SUCCESS_SCREEN_CLEARED: Workspace cleared. Ready for new analysis.
SUCCESS.ACTION_SUCCESS_FILE_LOADED: Dataset '{file_path}' imported into view '{panel_name}'. Data integrity verified.
SUCCESS.ACTION_SUCCESS_PANEL_CREATED: New view '{panel_name}' initialized. Lab workspace expanded.
SUCCESS.ACTION_SUCCESS_PANEL_SELECTED: Switching focus to view '{panel_name}'. Analysis scope adjusted.
SUCCESS.ACTION_SUCCESS_CLOSED_EDITOR: Dataset '{file_path}' editor closed. Changes saved to lab notebook.
SUCCESS.ACTION_SUCCESS_REPAIR_STARTED: System diagnostics initiated. Running comprehensive analysis...
SUCCESS.ACTION_SUCCESS_REPAIR_COMPLETE: All systems operational. Lab equipment calibrated and ready.
SUCCESS.ACTION_SUCCESS_UNDO: Previous action reversed. Experimental state restored.
SUCCESS.ACTION_SUCCESS_MAP_MOVED: Position updated to coordinates ({x}, {y}). Lab map synchronized.
SUCCESS.ACTION_SUCCESS_MAP_TELEPORT: Relocated to position ({x}, {y}). Equipment recalibrated for new location.
SUCCESS.ACTION_SUCCESS_LAYER_CHANGED: Layer switched to {layer}. Adjusting measurement parameters.
SUCCESS.ACTION_SUCCESS_DESCENDED: Descending to layer {layer}. Increasing analytical depth.
SUCCESS.ACTION_SUCCESS_ASCENDED: Ascending to layer {layer}. Broadening research scope.
SUCCESS.ACTION_SUCCESS_LOCATION_SET: Lab marker set at {city}. Geographic coordinates recorded.
SUCCESS.ACTION_SUCCESS_THEME_CHANGED: Lab configuration updated to {theme} mode. Equipment reconfigured.
SUCCESS.ACTION_SUCCESS_KNOWLEDGE_LOADED: Research database entry '{topic}' accessed. References compiled.
SUCCESS.ACTION_SUCCESS_CHARACTER_CREATED: Researcher '{name}' added to lab team. Credentials verified.
SUCCESS.ACTION_SUCCESS_LEVEL_UP: Research expertise increased. New skill level: {level}. Peer recognition achieved.

INFO.INFO_HELP_INTRO: Available laboratory methods (ordered by experimental workflow):
INFO.INFO_EXIT: Lab session terminated. All data saved and equipment powered down. 🔬
INFO.INFO_REPAIR_RUNNING: Running comprehensive lab diagnostics. Calibrating instruments...
INFO.INFO_UNDO_EMPTY: No previous actions to reverse. Experiment at initial state.
INFO.INFO_REDO_EMPTY: No actions to reapply. Current experimental state is most recent.
INFO.INFO_OFFLINE_MODE: [OFFLINE MODE] External databases unavailable. Using local research cache...

ERRORS.ERROR_SYNTAX: ?SYNTAX ERROR - Command format does not match established protocols
ERRORS.ERROR_NOT_FOUND: ?DATA NOT FOUND - Unable to locate specified resource
ERRORS.ERROR_INVALID: ?INVALID OPERATION - Procedure not supported by current lab configuration
ERRORS.ERROR_PERMISSIONS: ?ACCESS DENIED - Insufficient clearance level for this operation
ERRORS.ERROR_EMPTY_SLATE: ?EMPTY WORKSPACE - No data available for analysis
ERRORS.ERROR_NO_PATH: ?NO CONNECTION - Unable to establish link between specified endpoints
ERRORS.ERROR_DIRECTORY_NOT_FOUND: ?FOLDER NOT FOUND: {path} - Verify file system structure
ERRORS.ERROR_FILE_NOT_FOUND: ?DATASET NOT FOUND: {file_path} - Check file path and permissions
ERRORS.ERROR_PANEL_NOT_FOUND: ?VIEW NOT FOUND: {panel_name} - Unable to locate analysis window
ERRORS.ERROR_FAILED_TO_SAVE_FILE: ?EXPORT FAILED: {error} - Check storage capacity and permissions
ERRORS.ERROR_GENERIC: ?ERROR: {error} (Please check lab procedures and try again)
ERRORS.ERROR_AI_NO_KEY: ?RESEARCH DATABASE OFFLINE - Configure API access (Set GEMINI_API_KEY)
ERRORS.ERROR_KNOWLEDGE_NOT_FOUND: ?RESEARCH ENTRY NOT FOUND: {topic} - Check database integrity
ERRORS.ERROR_CALIBRATION_REQUIRED: ?CALIBRATION REQUIRED - Equipment needs adjustment before use
ERRORS.ERROR_STATISTICAL_INSIGNIFICANCE: ?RESULTS NOT STATISTICALLY SIGNIFICANT - More data required
